commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: The remaining action is maintainer product/privacy approval plus Vercel status-gate handling, not a narrow automated repair.; Cleared: The diff is security-sensitive because it adds browser search telemetry, but the current head includes origin gating, rate limiting, private-term rejection, curated-only publication, and bounded retention with... (sha=a028678f9ecd83480b5c17f634c798c7fa5ed990)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds materialized homepage recommendation chips backed by filtered search telemetry, package daily stats, UI submission recording, tests/spec notes, and a local dev persona handle fix.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this is a feature PR. The inspected backend transcript and screenshots give high-confidence after-change proof for endpoint safeguards, curated rebuild, retention cleanup, homepage chips, and click-through.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer product/privacy approval plus Vercel status-gate handling, not a narrow automated repair.

target.title: Recommend homepage search topics
target.body:
## Summary
- Replace the hard-coded homepage search chips with materialized recommendation topics.
- Record submitted search terms through a filtered, deduped, rate-limited UI telemetry endpoint.
- Add package daily stats and blend search, skill, and plugin activity into homepage recommendations.
- Add the visible homepage chip label: “What people are looking for”.

## Behavior
- Homepage chips now read from `recommendationTopics:listHomepageTopics` and fall back to the existing static suggestions when no materialized topics are available.
- Recommendation rebuilds score search demand, skill daily stats, and plugin/package daily stats on an hourly cron.
- Search telemetry now posts to `/api/v1/search/telemetry`, not the public `/api/v1/search` read endpoint.
- The telemetry endpoint rejects non-ClawHub browser origins before rate-limit consumption.
- Raw submitted search text can only boost curated recommendation topic buckets; it cannot mint arbitrary public homepage chips.
- Search telemetry rejects emails, URLs/domains, secrets, empty/noisy terms, and overlong inputs before writing aggregate daily counts.
- Telemetry retention now prunes both dedupe rows and aggregate rows, and schedules continuation when a prune batch fills.
- Clicking a chip still navigates to `/search?q=<topic>` and records that chip search submission best-effort.

## Tests
- `bunx vitest run convex/searchTelemetry.test.ts convex/recommendationTopics.test.ts convex/httpApiV1/searchTelemetryV1.test.ts`
- `bunx vitest run convex/packages.stats.test.ts convex/recommendationTopics.test.ts convex/searchTelemetry.test.ts convex/httpApiV1/searchTelemetryV1.test.ts src/__tests__/home-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/search-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/header.test.tsx`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- `git diff --check`

## Backend Proof
- Full proof transcript: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/fuller-stack-dev/clawhub/qa-artifacts/clawhub-ui-proof/pr-2279/backend-recommendation-proof-20260516-005916/report.md
- Raw proof files: https://github.com/fuller-stack-dev/clawhub/tree/qa-artifacts/clawhub-ui-proof/pr-2279/backend-recommendation-proof-20260516-005916
- `bunx convex dev --once --typecheck=disable` completed with `Convex functions ready`.
- `POST /api/v1/search/telemetry` with `Origin: http://localhost:3000` returned `202` and body `{"ok":true}`.
- `POST /api/v1/search/telemetry` with `Origin: https://spam.example` returned `403` and `Search telemetry source not allowed`.
- Old `POST /api/v1/search` returned `404`, proving the telemetry sink is no longer mounted on the public read search endpoint.
- The allowed telemetry POST was visible in today's aggregate stats via `internal.recommendationTopics.getSearchStatsForDay`.
- Seeded 12 distinct curated buckets and 12 distinct uncurated buckets through `recordSearchInternal`, the same aggregate mutation called by the HTTP handler.
- `internal.recommendationTopics.rebuildHomepageRecommendationTopicsAction({ limit: 8 })` returned `{ "ok": true, "count": 2 }`.
- `recommendationTopics:listHomepageTopics({ limit: 8 })` returned only curated topics: `github integration` and `security scanner`; the high-volume raw `cheap seo backlinks ...` query did not surface.
- Retention proof seeded two expired rows, ran prune with `batchSize: 1`, observed `{ "dedupeDeleted": 1, "statsDeleted": 1, "deleted": 2 }`, then observed `{ "deleted": 0 }` after scheduled continuation.

## UI Proof
- Local proof was run against `http://localhost:3000/` with seeded recommendation topics.
- Proof artifacts are published in the PR comment: https://github.com/openclaw/clawhub/pull/2279#issuecomment-4465456422
- Verified the homepage label, the seeded chip texts, and click-through from `mcp tools` to `/search?q=mcp+tools`.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
